basic_details.job_title: NPOL DRDO Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 35 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL DRDO)
basic_details.short_information: Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL DRDO) Paid Intern Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DRDO/NPOL. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced through the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Final year UG/PG students in respective disciplines from AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute, Minimum 75% marks or >=7.5 CGPA/SGPA until previous year/semester, Internship/project work of minimum six months duration should be part of the curriculum
qualification.details: Final year UG/PG students in Computer Science / AI & ML / Data Science from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum. Final year UG/PG students in Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum. Final year UG/PG students in Mechanical Engineering from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum. Final year UG/PG students in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science or Technology from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum. Final year UG/PG students in Physics / Opto Electronics from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum. Final year UG/PG students in Ocean Science / Ocean Technology from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute. Minimum 75% marks or a CGPA/SGPA of 7.5 until the previous year/semester. Internship/project work of a minimum six months duration must be part of the curriculum.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Computer Science / AI & ML / Data Science
Electronics & Communication Engineering / Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Instrumentation Engineering
Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science or Technology

selection_process: Shortlisting based on academic record (min 75% or 7.5 CGPA) Interaction (in person/telephone/VC) Document Verification at joining
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NPOL DRDO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern posts is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern position at NPOL DRDO?
faq.answer: There are a total of 35 vacancies available for the Paid Intern position at the Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL DRDO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be final year UG/PG students in relevant disciplines from an AICTE/UGC recognized Indian University/Institute, with a minimum of 75% marks or 7.5 CGPA/SGPA. The internship/project work of at least six months duration should be part of the curriculum.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Paid Intern posts is 28 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the available data.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Intern position will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for NPOL DRDO Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on academic records, followed by an interaction (in person, telephone, or VC), and document verification at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NPOL DRDO Paid Intern recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL DRDO) located?
faq.answer: The Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL DRDO) is located in Kochi, Kerala, with the pincode 682021.

faq.question: Q10. When will the internship commence if selected?
faq.answer: The date of commencement of the internship for the selected candidates is scheduled for 01st July 2026.
